title: Gun vs Boss
description: add gun and more boss. Have fun!!
body:
Gun vs Boss is an action-packed Minecraft modpack focused on intense combat between modern weapons and powerful bosses.

In this modpack, players can use a wide variety of guns, including rifles, shotguns, and heavy weapons, to fight against dangerous bosses from different mods such as Mowzie’s Mobs and other challenging enemies.

The gameplay is fast-paced and combat-focused. Players will need to prepare their gear, upgrade weapons, and develop strategies to defeat increasingly difficult bosses.

Key Features:
- Modern gun system with realistic combat
- Epic boss fights with unique abilities
- RPG-style progression and challenges
- Survival and combat-focused gameplay

This modpack transforms Minecraft into a thrilling battle experience where skill and strategy are required to survive.
